{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Manager",
  "description": "Polaris Digitech Limited is a&nbsp;location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client&rsquo;s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Department: Finance/Accounting
Reports To: Managing Director

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced Finance Manager to oversee financial planning, budgeting, reporting, and compliance.
	The ideal candidate will provide strategic financial insights to support business growth and profitability.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead financial planning, budgeting, and forecasting processes
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Conduct variance and profitability analysis
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards and tax regulations
	Maintain strong internal controls and financial policies
	Coordinate audits and manage statutory reporting
	Provide financial insights to support strategic decision-making
	Supervise and mentor finance team (where applicable).


Requirements


	BSc / HND qualification in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	5 - 7 years of progressive finance/accounting experience
	ACA or ACCA qualification (mandatory)
	Strong knowledge of GAAP and financial reporting
	Experience in budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	Strong analytical, communication, and leadership skills
	Technology sector experience is an advantage.


Compensation


	Competitive salary (based on experience)
	Other benefits as applicable.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@polarisdigitech.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Finance Manager Job at Polaris Digitech Limited




        
    

        
        Polaris Digitech Limited is a location intelligence firm that specializes in providing data, software and decision support services to fulfill its client’s strategies and management needs through the development and deployment of Geographic Information Systems (GIS).

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Department: Finance/Accounting
Reports To: Managing Director

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced Finance Manager to oversee financial planning, budgeting, reporting, and compliance.
	The ideal candidate will provide strategic financial insights to support business growth and profitability.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead financial planning, budgeting, and forecasting processes
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports
	Conduct variance and profitability analysis
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards and tax regulations
	Maintain strong internal controls and financial policies
	Coordinate audits and manage statutory reporting
	Provide financial insights to support strategic decision-making
	Supervise and mentor finance team (where applicable).


Requirements


	BSc / HND qualification in Accounting, Finance, or related fields
	5 - 7 years of progressive finance/accounting experience
	ACA or ACCA qualification (mandatory)
	Strong knowledge of GAAP and financial reporting
	Experience in budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software
	Strong analytical, communication, and leadership skills
	Technology sector experience is an advantage.


Compensation


	Competitive salary (based on experience)
	Other benefits as applicable.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@polarisdigitech.net using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Chilis Restaurant is a 24-hours restaurant with good quality of food and good services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier
Job Location:&nbsp;Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Transaction Handling: Process payments from customers using various payment methods such as cash, debit cards, and mobile/ transfer payments and issuing change accurately
	Order Management: Take customer orders and input them into the point of sale (POS) system accurately. Also ensure that any special requests or modifications are clearly communicated to the kitchen staff.
	Customer service: Greet customers warmly and answer any questions about the menu or promotions. Also address customer complaints or issues promptly and professionally to ensure satisfaction.
	Cash Drawer Management: Count Money in the cash drawer at the beginning and end of shifts to ensure accuracy. Maintain adequate change in the cash drawer and reconcile daily cash receipts with sales., including sanitizing
	Cleaning and Maintenance: Keep the cashier area clean and organize, including sanitizing surfaces and organizing receipts, documents and all cashiers books. Also ensure that the work area is tidy and free of clutter.
	Inventory and Supplies: Monitor supplies in the cashier area, such as receipt paper and condiments. Also notify management when stock is low and needs replenishing.
	Speed and Efficiency:Workquicklyand efficiently to minimizewait times for customers
	It&#39;s a 24hrs restaurant that runs morning, afternoon and night shifts.
	Proximity to Awolowo is preferred.


Salary
N30,000 - N55,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;chilisrestaurant.ibadan@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "name": "Chilis Restaurant"
    
  },

  },

Cashier Job at Chilis Restaurant




        
    

        
        Chilis Restaurant is a 24-hours restaurant with good quality of food and good services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier
Job Location: Bodija, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Transaction Handling: Process payments from customers using various payment methods such as cash, debit cards, and mobile/ transfer payments and issuing change accurately
	Order Management: Take customer orders and input them into the point of sale (POS) system accurately. Also ensure that any special requests or modifications are clearly communicated to the kitchen staff.
	Customer service: Greet customers warmly and answer any questions about the menu or promotions. Also address customer complaints or issues promptly and professionally to ensure satisfaction.
	Cash Drawer Management: Count Money in the cash drawer at the beginning and end of shifts to ensure accuracy. Maintain adequate change in the cash drawer and reconcile daily cash receipts with sales., including sanitizing
	Cleaning and Maintenance: Keep the cashier area clean and organize, including sanitizing surfaces and organizing receipts, documents and all cashiers books. Also ensure that the work area is tidy and free of clutter.
	Inventory and Supplies: Monitor supplies in the cashier area, such as receipt paper and condiments. Also notify management when stock is low and needs replenishing.
	Speed and Efficiency:Workquicklyand efficiently to minimizewait times for customers
	It's a 24hrs restaurant that runs morning, afternoon and night shifts.
	Proximity to Awolowo is preferred.


Salary
N30,000 - N55,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: chilisrestaurant.ibadan@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Trade Marketing Representative",
  "description": "International Breweries Plc - Our Dream is to bring people together for a better world. Beer, the original social network, has been bringing people together for thousands of years. We are committed to building great brands that stand the test of time and to brewing the best beers using the finest natural ingredients.

Our diverse portfolio of well over 400 beer brands includes global brands Budweiser, Corona and Stella Artois; multi-country brands Beck&rsquo;s, Castle, Castle Lite, Hoegaarden, and Leffe; and local champions such as Aguila, Bud Light, Jupiler, Klinskoye, Modelo Especial, Quilmes, Skol, and Victoria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Trade Marketing Representative

Job Requisition ID:&nbsp;30094601
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja

Purpose


	The key purpose of this role is to leverage capital and people resources in order to enhance sustainable growth in sales volume, market share and competitive advantage&nbsp;


Key Outputs and Responsibilities
Channel Management &amp; Execution:


	Custodian of channel and trade marketing knowledge and expertise.
	Define, quantify and sensibly segment the appropriate channel within the market, and then apply channel strategies accordingly
	Ongoing development, co-ordination and standardisation of IRVPs incorporating this into the connection strategy through alignment with marketing and execution standards, development of tool kits, frameworks, measures and standards and best practice transfers
	Develop the above IRVPs programmes (in conjunction with brand marketing) that fit, and are appropriate to, agreed channel strategies, including events, refrigeration, draught, merchandising, category management, signage and promotions.
	To develop expertise in merchandising, promotions, point of connection (POC), events, category management, BTL, calendar development etc.
	Ownership of the system to monitor trade execution standard whilst working with sales team to ensure execution standards are met
	Develop, own and drive Cold Strategy in country


Channel Communication:


	Develop and own the definition of execution standards across all elements of the sales driver triangle
	Develop annual BTL plans (Executions and Promotions) and communicate to sales teams
	Complete details behind each activity including budgets, capture in an annual activity plan and share with sales teams
	Develop and manage appropriate competitor response in trade
	Ensure promotion activities and point of connection materials allocations take place as per plans and need for ad hoc responses from time to time
	Review activity and results; communicate changes and initiatives through regular CPF sessions.
	Review, Track in-trade audit KPIs and communicate in-trade audit standards


Budgets and P&amp;L:


	Fully accountable for BTL budget, including Executions and Brand Promotions
	Fully accountable for Coolers, Draught and Activations equipment Capex budget
	Ensure adherence to budget disciplines for department
	Implement appropriate controls to ensure transparency and accountability of expenditure
	Manage fixed costs


Customer Relationships:


	Build effective business partnerships with key customers
	Manage 3rd Party BTL agencies and ensure set standards are met at all times.
	Review performance against communicated targets


Minimum Requirements


	Minimum of a first Degree in either Business Administration or Humanities from an accredited, and recognised university
	2 years of experience in trade marketing
	Proficiency in the use of Microsoft office applications i.e. (Microsoft Excel, Word and PowerPoint).


Key attributes and competencies:


	Excellent management &amp; leadership skills
	Practical knowledge of market structures and consumer trends in Nigeria
	Numeracy Skills &ndash; ability to work with detailed analysis
	Process and Project management
	Ability to persuade and get results through managing diverse groups
	High attention to detail


Additional Information:


	Band: IX.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-03-03",
  "validThrough": "2026-03-12",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "International Breweries Plc"
    
  },

Trade Marketing Representative Job at International Breweries Plc




        
    

        
        International Breweries Plc - Our Dream is to bring people together for a better world. Beer, the original social network, has been bringing people together for thousands of years. We are committed to building great brands that stand the test of time and to brewing the best beers using the finest natural ingredients.

Our diverse portfolio of well over 400 beer brands includes global brands Budweiser, Corona and Stella Artois; multi-country brands Beck’s, Castle, Castle Lite, Hoegaarden, and Leffe; and local champions such as Aguila, Bud Light, Jupiler, Klinskoye, Modelo Especial, Quilmes, Skol, and Victoria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Trade Marketing Representative
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Requisition ID: 30094601
Job Location: Abuja

Purpose


	The key purpose of this role is to leverage capital and people resources in order to enhance sustainable growth in sales volume, market share and competitive advantage 


Key Outputs and Responsibilities
Channel Management & Execution:


	Custodian of channel and trade marketing knowledge and expertise.
	Define, quantify and sensibly segment the appropriate channel within the market, and then apply channel strategies accordingly
	Ongoing development, co-ordination and standardisation of IRVPs incorporating this into the connection strategy through alignment with marketing and execution standards, development of tool kits, frameworks, measures and standards and best practice transfers
	Develop the above IRVPs programmes (in conjunction with brand marketing) that fit, and are appropriate to, agreed channel strategies, including events, refrigeration, draught, merchandising, category management, signage and promotions.
	To develop expertise in merchandising, promotions, point of connection (POC), events, category management, BTL, calendar development etc.
	Ownership of the system to monitor trade execution standard whilst working with sales team to ensure execution standards are met
	Develop, own and drive Cold Strategy in country


Channel Communication:


	Develop and own the definition of execution standards across all elements of the sales driver triangle
	Develop annual BTL plans (Executions and Promotions) and communicate to sales teams
	Complete details behind each activity including budgets, capture in an annual activity plan and share with sales teams
	Develop and manage appropriate competitor response in trade
	Ensure promotion activities and point of connection materials allocations take place as per plans and need for ad hoc responses from time to time
	Review activity and results; communicate changes and initiatives through regular CPF sessions.
	Review, Track in-trade audit KPIs and communicate in-trade audit standards


Budgets and P&L:


	Fully accountable for BTL budget, including Executions and Brand Promotions
	Fully accountable for Coolers, Draught and Activations equipment Capex budget
	Ensure adherence to budget disciplines for department
	Implement appropriate controls to ensure transparency and accountability of expenditure
	Manage fixed costs


Customer Relationships:


	Build effective business partnerships with key customers
	Manage 3rd Party BTL agencies and ensure set standards are met at all times.
	Review performance against communicated targets


Minimum Requirements


	Minimum of a first Degree in either Business Administration or Humanities from an accredited, and recognised university
	2 years of experience in trade marketing
	Proficiency in the use of Microsoft office applications i.e. (Microsoft Excel, Word and PowerPoint).


Key attributes and competencies:


	Excellent management & leadership skills
	Practical knowledge of market structures and consumer trends in Nigeria
	Numeracy Skills – ability to work with detailed analysis
	Process and Project management
	Ability to persuade and get results through managing diverse groups
	High attention to detail


Additional Information:


	Band: IX.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Apex Restaurant
content:
Apex Restaurant is a fast food restaurant located in Wuse 2 Abuja.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Runner

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Apex Restauant is looking for a runner to support its restaurant business.


Requirement


	Interested candidiates should possess an OND qualification and 3 - 5 years of relevant work experience.


Application Closing Date: 10th March, 2026.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@vestatesng.com using Runner as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Waiter / Waitress

Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Part-time

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications and experience.


Application Closing Date: 9th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resumeto: hr@vestatesng.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Pastry Chef

Job Location:  Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Apex Restaurant is seeking a highly skilled and "hands-on" Pastry Chef to lead our dessert and bakery operations.
	The ideal candidate will possess extensive experience within a dedicated pastry business, a high-end hospitality environment, or a fine-dining establishment.
	We are looking for a creative professional who is passionate about delivering exceptional quality and artisanal techniques.


Application Closing Date: 10th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: hr@vestatesng.com using "Pastry Chef" as the subject of email.

     

    

        Click here to Apply
